articles.title: Biasin: "Milan chose the risk, the fans didn't deserve this solution"
articles.summary: During the last episode of QSVS, the well-known journalist Fabrizio Biasin spoke about Cardinale's choices regarding the new corporate structure. These are his words.

articles.title: Manchester United buys the land for the future Old Trafford
articles.summary: (ANSA) - LONDON, JUNE 22 - Manchester United has acquired most of the land needed to build its new 100,000-seat stadium, the largest in Great Britain, the club has announced.

articles.title: World Cup: 2-0 to Austria, Argentina in the round of 32. Messi record holder
articles.summary: (ANSA) - ROME, JUNE 22 - Argentina beat Austria 2-0 (1-0) in a match in the second round of group J of the World Cup played in Dallas and qualified with one match to spare for the round of 32.

articles.title: Ravezzani underlines: "Now everyone will have to get along, hopefully Amorim will go as well as in Portugal"

articles.title: Marchetti: "The managers of the new organizational chart already worked at Milan in roles that were certainly less central than those they will have today"

articles.title: Ordine underlines: “Cardinal used to delegate, now he is only in command and he decides everything”
